# CollectAI

> AI-powered trading card identification, condition grading, and real-time market valuation for Pokémon, Magic, Yu-Gi-Oh!, sports cards, coins, and comics.

CollectAI lets collectors snap a photo of any card and instantly receive identification, AI-graded condition, defect maps, and live market pricing aggregated from eBay and TCGPlayer. Collections can be organized into folders, shared publicly, and listed on a multi-chain (Ethereum + Solana) marketplace with USDC/USDT payments.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and AI scan demo.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): The end-to-end scanning, grading, and pricing pipeline.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free tier, Pro subscription, and credit packs.
- [Scan](/scan): Upload a card photo for AI identification and grading.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Personal portfolio analytics and recent scans.
- [Collection](/collection): Organize and manage your card collection.
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Browse cards listed by collectors with on-chain escrow.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about accuracy, payments, and grading.
- [About](/about): Mission and team behind CollectAI.
- [Partners](/partners): Card shop and grading partner program.
- [Free Guide](/free-guide): Beginner's guide to card grading and valuation.

## Legal

- [Terms of Service](/terms): Usage terms.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Data handling and user privacy.
- [Refund Policy](/refund): Subscription and credit pack refunds.
- [Delete Account](/delete-account): Permanent account deletion.
